title: XJ-7 airspeeder
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Narglatch XJ-7''' was a prototype [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] produced by [[Narglatch AirTech/Legends|Narglatch AirTech]] following the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

A [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] operative was known to have used a prototype XJ-7 during the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was said that Black Sun's security was so good, when he left the speeder unattended in the [[Wicko District]], he returned three days later to find it had not been touched.

==Appearances==
*''[[Evasive Action: Prey]]'' {{Mo}}
